data/maps/FortreeCity_PokemonCenter_1F/t.FortreeCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_GoToSa: Listen, kid, are you working\non a POKéDEX?\pHmm... Go to the SAFARI ZONE.\nThat's my suggestion.
data/maps/FortreeCity_PokemonCenter_1F/t.FortreeCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Record:
Have you done anything at the
RECORD CORNER?\pIt's pretty neat. It mixes and matches
the records of TRAINERS.\pI don't know quite how it works,
but it's cool. It's exciting, even!
data/maps/FortreeCity_PokemonCenter_1F/t.FortreeCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_DoYouK:
Hey, you've got a POKéNAV!
It's the same as mine.\pCheck out the TRAINER'S EYES on it.\pIt shows you TRAINERS who want a
rematch with you.\pIsn't it great?
You have to hand it to DEVON!
